name: Missed Collection
description: Bin was not emptied on collection day
checks: Which bin type was missed (general, recycling, green)?
Was the bin placed out correctly and on time?

outcomes.user_error: Bin was not placed out correctly or on time

response_templates.rebook_collection: Thank you for reporting the missed collection at {address}. A return pickup has been arranged.
response_templates.user_error: Please ensure your bin is placed at the kerb by 6am on collection day with the lid closed.
